title: Microsoft for Nonprofits
description: Microsoft for Nonprofits provides eligible nonprofit or social-impact organizations with software donations, nonprofit discounts, cloud credits, communications tools, productivity tools, security tools, nonprofit consulting under its current published program terms.
eligibility: Organizations must satisfy the provider's current nonprofit-status verification, acceptable-use, product, and regional requirements.
value: Technology grants, discounted cloud products, security resources, and nonprofit support under current program terms.
